summary: Completed Phase 1, 2, 3 testing for FrameBook Pro. Fixed critical SelectItem empty value error in ProductManagement.js and PublicProducts.js. All backend APIs (30 tests) passing. Frontend features working correctly.

issues: Event ID shown as UUID instead of event name

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty value causing runtime error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and handled in onValueChange

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty value causing runtime error on Products page
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed category filter value='' to value='all' and sort filter value='' to value='default'

action_items: All critical issues fixed - no action items required
critical_code_review_comments: React SelectItem component requires non-empty string value - fixed in both admin and public components
DialogContent components missing Description/aria-describedby - accessibility improvement opportunity
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed products, categories, gallery images, and clients
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 (Module Control), Phase 2 (Product Catalog), and Phase 3 (Public Website) features are fully functional. Super Admin can create/edit clients with module selection (about, services, gallery, booking, products, offers, contact). Admin can manage Products (multi-language name/description, images, base price, discount %, auto-calculated final price) and Gallery (images with title, description, category, featured flag). Site Content Editor allows editing all website sections (Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Products, Booking, Contact, Footer) with multi-language support. Public website dynamically shows navigation based on enabled modules. Products page has Flipkart-style grid with category filter and price sorting. Gallery has lightbox feature.

client_management.list_clients: PASS - Shows all clients with modules badge
client_management.create_client: PASS - Dialog with module checkboxes (About, Services, Gallery, Booking, Products, Offers, Contact)

product_management.list_view: PASS - Shows summary cards (Total, Active, With Discount, Categories) and product grid
product_management.create: PASS - Dialog with multi-language tabs (EN, KN, HI), image URLs, base price, discount %, category
product_management.edit: PASS - Can update price, discount, status

gallery_management.list_view: PASS - Shows summary cards (Total, Featured, Categories) and image grid
gallery_management.add_image: PASS - Dialog with URL, title, description, category, featured toggle
gallery_management.edit_image: PASS - Can update title, featured status, category

site_content_editor.sections: PASS - Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Products, Booking, Contact, Footer sections editable
site_content_editor.multi_language: PASS - Each section has EN, KN, HI tabs

public_website.homepage: PASS - Shows hero section with content from site editor
public_website.navigation: PASS - Shows only enabled modules (HOME, ABOUT, SERVICES, GALLERY, PRODUCTS, PRICING, BOOK NOW)
public_website.products_page: PASS - Grid display with search, category filter, price sorting
public_website.gallery_page: PASS - Grid with category filter, lightbox on click
public_website.language_selector: PASS - Dropdown with EN, KN, HI
